body: Hi! I'm Asha, I lead ops at Zenlytics. Saw your product on LinkedIn — what's the pricing for the pro plan?
Also do you have annual billing? We'd need it in INR with GST invoice.
Hi Asha! Yes, annual billing in INR is available. Sharing the pricing deck shortly.
Got the deck, thanks. Can we do a quick demo call Thursday 4pm?
Hello, Vikram here from Finlok. We're evaluating tools for our sales team — could you show us a demo this week?
Hi Vikram! Absolutely, does Friday 11am work for a walkthrough?
Friday works. Also send a rough quote for 25 seats please.
One more thing — do you integrate with Tally? Our finance team asked.
Hi, this is Priya from Craftkart. A friend recommended you. What does the starter plan cost per month?
Hi Priya! Starter is Rs 2,999/month for up to 5 users. Happy to walk you through it.
That fits our budget. We want to purchase before month end — can you send the signup link?
Hey! Rohan here, co-founder at Stackwave. Can we get a demo for my team next week?
Hi Rohan, sure! Monday or Tuesday afternoon?
Tuesday 3pm. We're currently on spreadsheets, so keep it basic :)
Hi team, Sneha from Urbanest. The export to CSV is not working since yesterday — getting an error on the contacts page.
Sorry about that Sneha! Our team is looking into the issue, will update you within the hour.
Works now, thanks for the quick fix!
Hi, Karthik here from Agrilink in Hyderabad. What's the pricing for 50+ users? Do you offer volume discounts?
Hi Karthik! Yes, above 50 seats we do custom pricing. Can I get you on a call with our sales lead?
Sure, weekdays after 5pm work best for me.
Hello, Meera from Bloomtail here. We haven't received the invoice for June yet. Can you resend it to accounts?
Hi Meera, resent the June invoice just now. Please check!
Received, payment will be processed this week.
Hi! Arjun from Dukaan Labs. Saw your demo video — impressive. Can my team get a live walkthrough?
Thanks Arjun! How about Wednesday at noon?
Wednesday noon confirmed. We'll have 4 people joining.
Hi, Divya here from Nimbus HR. Comparing you with two other vendors — what makes your pricing different?
Hi Divya! No per-seat charges on the growth plan, unlimited contacts. Sending a comparison sheet.
Helpful, thanks. Will discuss internally and get back by Monday.
Namaste! Sanjay from Khetibazar, Pune. We want to buy the growth plan for our 12-person sales team. What are the next steps?
Namaste Sanjay! Great to hear. I'll send the order form and onboarding checklist today.
Received. Signing and sending back tomorrow morning.
Hi, Neha from Toursmith. Login OTPs are reaching us with a 10 minute delay — is there an issue on your side?
Hi Neha, our SMS provider had a hiccup this morning. Should be resolved now — please retry.
Working now. Please add email OTP as a backup option, it would help a lot.
Salaam! Farhan here from Qafila Logistics. Heard about you at SaaSBoomi. Can we schedule a demo and get pricing for the enterprise plan?
Hi Farhan! Great meeting folks from SaaSBoomi. How about a demo on Monday 11am? Enterprise deck attached.
Monday 11am works. Our CTO will join too.
Quick follow-up — does the pro plan include the WhatsApp integration or is that an add-on?
Signed up! Payment done via UPI. Looking forward to onboarding.
